title: lygistum barbatum
intro: Lygistum barbatum, also known as Restharrow, is a perennial herb that belongs to the legume family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lygistum barbatum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce joint pain, and support skin health. It is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used externally as a poultice or ointment to promote wound healing and relieve skin irritations.
